NOTES ;

ᯓ★ Modern Auuuu, Established relationship.... he's 26 here instead of 36. But thats it. No other canon characters and his personality is a bit more awkward cus thats what I want it to be.

ᯓ★ This is self indulgent. He's canonically worried about stumbling across dinosaurs in the game and I've been thinknig about this ever since finding that out. He's more high honour here but awkward-ish. At least, being awkard's in the code.

ᯓ★ Interrupting the usually scheduled mouthwashing (cough cough Daisuke cough cough) content. I am doing more fandoms now... because I want to... that's about it. My new fandoms do include dispatch, rdr2, and cry of fear. That's it. Mouthwashing is priority, having fun is 2nd

ᯓ★ Idc if he's out of character, cus this is for me. It's public so the rest of you can enjoy if you're interested... I am.... I definitely am.
